answer: The Markdown frontmatter canary showed a metadata extraction success rate issue caused by the concept frontmatter parser skipping non-index markdown; the pipeline was md_frontmatter_ingest_v1, the metadata source was yaml_frontmatter rather than body_text_only, and the remediation/validation were to enable parsing of YAML frontmatter on non-index Markdown files and confirm concept-fm-canary-pass.

facts.remediation: enable parsing of YAML frontmatter on non-index Markdown files
facts.root_cause: concept frontmatter parser skipped non-index markdown
